paper_title: DQ-BART: Efficient Sequence-to-Sequence Model via Joint Distillation and Quantization

raw_extraction.organization: Cornell University, AWS AI Labs, University of Pennsylvania
raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **DQ-BART**, a framework combining **distillation** (transferring knowledge from a full-precision teacher model to a quantized student model) and **quantization** (reducing model bit-width) to achieve significant compression ratios (~16.5x) while preserving performance on generative tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Not explicitly detailed in abstract, inferred from context (likely BooksCorpus/Wikipedia-like)
raw_extraction.application: Text summarization, long-form question answering, machine translation
raw_extraction.license: null (not specified in abstract, likely proprietary or open-source depending on original BART)
raw_extraction.research_problem: Efficient deployment of large pre-trained seq2seq models in resource-constrained environments
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Supervised fine-tuning on downstream tasks (summarization, QA, translation)
